entries.result: Blazing sun scorches the landscape. Heat shimmers dance on the horizon. Drink water or suffer.
Overcast sky with a cool breeze. Comfortable travel weather — almost pleasant.
Light drizzle and drifting fog. Visibility is poor; sounds are muffled and strange.
Heavy downpour! Thunder crashes and lightning splits the sky. Seek shelter or get soaked.
Howling blizzard whips snow and ice across the land. Frozen winds cut through any cloak.
An arcane storm! Purple lightning arcs between clouds, strange symbols flicker in the sky, and the air hums with wild magic.
Thick fog rolls in, reducing visibility to mere feet. Shapes move in the periphery.
Gentle snowfall carpets the world in white. An eerie quiet settles over everything.
Perfectly clear sky. The stars burn bright above, and a gentle breeze carries the scent of wildflowers.
Volcanic ash drifts down like grey snow. The air tastes of sulfur, and the sun is a dim orange disc.
Humid air thick with swarming insects. Midges and mosquitoes bite at every patch of exposed skin.
Heavy humidity presses down. Dark thunderheads gather on the horizon, threatening worse to come.
Strong gusting winds bend trees and whip loose objects through the air. Difficult travel conditions.
A misty morning with heavy dew. Every blade of grass glistens, and the world feels fresh and new.
A sudden hailstorm pounds the ground with icy pellets the size of grapes.
A dust storm rises from nowhere, scouring the land with grit and reducing sight to a few feet.
A brilliant rainbow arches across the sky after a short, fierce shower. A moment of rare beauty.
Unseasonable heat wave. The air shimmers, sweat pours, and even the birds have gone silent.
An eerie, dead calm. The air is perfectly still, no birds sing, and the silence presses in like a physical weight.
The sky turns an ominous blood-red as strange winds howl across the land. Something is very wrong with the world.
